---
title: "Projects"
description: "Selected GitHub projects by Miguel Cosenza Contreras."
---

Selected public GitHub projects related to proteomics bioinformatics, terminomics, clinical multi-omics, and reproducible analysis.

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### Drug-Response Complexome Screening Viewer
Static SEC-MS complexome showcase for exploring HSP90 inhibitor-associated protein assembly perturbations in public processed proteomics data.

:::{.tags}
[`SEC-MS`]{.tag} [`complexome`]{.tag} [`proteomics`]{.tag} [`viewer`]{.tag}
:::

[Project page](projects/drug-response-complexome/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### TermineR
R package for extracting, annotating, and visualizing endogenous proteolytic processing information from shotgun proteomics data.

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`proteomics`]{.tag} [`terminomics`]{.tag} [`software`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/TermineR) | [Project page](projects/terminer/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### TermineR Data Analysis Pipeline
Reproducible analysis pipeline connected to the TermineR method paper and example workflows.

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`Quarto`]{.tag} [`reproducibility`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/TermineR_data_analysis_pipeline)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### GBM Proteometabolomics
Reproducible analysis for proteomics, lipidomics, proteogenomics, and clinical integration in initial and recurrent glioblastoma.

:::{.tags}
[`clinical proteomics`]{.tag} [`multi-omics`]{.tag} [`R`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/gbm_manuscript_data_analysis) | [Project page](projects/gbm-proteometabolomics/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### HUNTER Data Analysis Pipeline
RStudio and Quarto workflow for exploratory and inferential analysis of HUNTER terminal-enrichment experiments.

:::{.tags}
[`Quarto`]{.tag} [`DIA`]{.tag} [`terminomics`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/HUNTER_data_analysis_pipeline) | [Project page](projects/hunter/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Necrodegradomics
Reproducible analysis of proteome alterations in human autopsy tissues in relation to time after death.

:::{.tags}
[`tissue proteomics`]{.tag} [`limma`]{.tag} [`reproducible report`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/Necrodegradomics) | [Project page](projects/necrodegradomics/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### enrichRoast
Scripts and functions to run limma::roast enrichment analyses and generate tabular outputs and visualizations.

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`enrichment analysis`]{.tag} [`limma`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/enrichRoast) | [Project page](projects/enrichroast/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Proteomics Data Analysis
Collection of scripts, functions, and snippets for processing and analyzing proteomics data.

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`proteomics`]{.tag} [`utilities`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/1_Proteomics_data_analysis) | [Project page](projects/proteomics-data-analysis/)
:::
:::

## Additional Public Repositories

- [Fragterminomics](https://github.com/MiguelCos/Fragterminomics)
- [fragenterminomics](https://github.com/MiguelCos/fragenterminomics)
- [BAG3 turboID proteomics differential abundance analysis](https://github.com/MiguelCos/BAG3_turboID_proteomics-Differential-abundance-analysis)
